ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country belongs to */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES dataset_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the dataset type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data is for */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data point */,
  "source_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the source of the data point */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data point */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
